channel.title: About on RenatoTeixeira.com
channel.description: Recent content in About on RenatoTeixeira.com

item.title: About
item.description:
About Link to heading

I am a specialist in Legacy Modernization and Mission-Critical Systems Architecture, with a career spanning over 25 years helping organizations evolve complex technology environments. Currently, I serve as a Distinguished Solution Engineer at Oracle, supporting enterprises across Latin America in defining modernization strategies for core systems where resilience and security are non-negotiable.

Professional Expertise Link to heading

My career is built at the intersection of cloud strategy and software architecture.
